CustomField.description: Login Flow sets this to true at login when Tos_Version_Accepted__c does not match FIMBY_App_Settings.Default.Tos_Current_Version__c (or acceptance pre-dates the current Tos_Effective_Date__c). The fimbyUniversalHeader LWC reads this from the existing acting-as DTO and shows the TOS reacceptance modal. FimbyTosController.acceptTos clears it on successful acceptance. Set high-frequency on every login, so trackHistory is false.
CustomField.label: TOS Reacceptance Required
